description_zh:
# 大安區精緻共居空間 | 近復興站 | 短租友善

找的不只是一個房間？加入我們充滿活力的國際社群！

## 為什麼你會愛上這裡

- 超大陽光客廳，落地窗設計，適合遠端工作
- 全配廚房（對，你可以下廚！）
- 高速網路，兩間衛浴

## 每月租金

- Room C: NT$ 9,500
- Room H: NT$ 12,500

## 彈性租期

- 短租 1-2 個月: +NT$ 3,000/月
- 短租 3-5 個月: +NT$ 2,000/月
description_en:
# Chic Shared Living near Fuxing Station | Short-term Friendly

Looking for more than just a room? Join our vibrant international community!

## Why You'll Love It

- **The Hub**: Massive, sun-drenched living room with floor-to-ceiling windows. Perfect for remote work, evening chats, or hosting a game night!
- **Lifestyle**: Fully equipped kitchen (yes, you can cook!), cozy reading corners, and high-speed internet.
- **Hassle-Free**: With 2 bathrooms and professional trash collection, living is easy and organized.

## Monthly Rent

- Room C: NT$ 9,500 (Cozy & Functional)
- Room H: NT$ 12,500 (Spacious with private seating vibe)
- Room I: NT$ 12,000 (Warm wood flooring & minimalist style)

## Flexible Lease Terms

- Short term (1-2 months): +NT$ 3,000/mo
- Short term (3-5 months): +NT$ 2,000/mo
- Deposit: 2 months | Agency fee: 0.5 month (only upon signing)
